title: QuickLog-Solo History Log Schema
description: Schema for a single line in history NDJSON files used in QuickLog-Solo.

startTime.description: Start timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.

endTime.description: End timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.

color.description: The theme color used at the time of recording.

isManualStop.description: Whether the task was explicitly stopped by the user.

resumableCategory.description: The category to resume after a pause.

tags.description: Comma-separated list of tags associated with the task.
